case_title: WADE HOLLOWAY VS. COAST TO COAST MARKETING AND PROMOTIONS, INC.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOLLOWAY, WADE AS TO DEFENDANT COAST TO COAST MARKETING AND PROMOTIONS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
